title: I built a simple AI workflow for stock research — curious how others are doing it in 2026
author: molli988
selftext:
I’ve been experimenting with how AI tools can improve stock research and company analysis.
I put together a breakdown of the tools I currently use and how they fit into my workflow (from understanding companies → analyzing them → building investment ideas faster).
Curious how others are approaching AI in investing in 2026.
[https://open.substack.com/pub/molli98/p/best-ai-tools-for-investors-in-2026?utm\_source=share&utm\_medium=android&r=8kqvvj⁠�](https://open.substack.com/pub/molli98/p/best-ai-tools-for-investors-in-2026?utm_source=share&utm_medium=android&r=8kqvvj⁠�)
